title: Responsive and visual regression suite

artifactPolicy.privacy: Synthetic/local fixtures only; no private transcript, audio, vocabulary, profile, adapter, or support-bundle payloads are captured.
residualGaps: The suite captures runtime PNG artifacts and layout metrics instead of committed screenshot baselines so CI stays deterministic across Linux font/rendering updates.
Diagnostics may contain intentionally scrollable internal tables, but the page shell itself must not overflow horizontally at 320 CSS px.
Dark/system appearance is not captured because this release does not add a separate dark-mode implementation.

requiredStates.target: Dictate region with installed speech model and ready recording control
Aggregate local setup checking state while speech-model availability is being resolved
Dictate region while fake microphone capture is pressed
Import route after rejecting an invalid .speechmodel prefix
Vocabulary list with a search that returns no matching sets
Voice-model list and selected active model detail
Training support panel with a seeded reload-recovery checkpoint
Export route blocked until the exact required speech model is installed
Training support panel after the synthetic training check reaches Ready

visualAssertions: Each required state is captured at every reference viewport as a Playwright PNG attachment.
Every captured state asserts a visible target region, non-empty screenshot bytes, and no document-level horizontal overflow.
A separate 320 CSS px reflow test visits every responsive route and rejects page-level horizontal scrolling.
